summary: Session 2 of 2 (final/release) shipped the operator affordance, docs, and patch release for local-only close-out mode. Added the blessed ai_router.local_only CLI (--enable/--disable/--status, idempotent, audit note written inside the .dabbler/local-only marker on enable, display-only ASCII-safe console output with the marker file kept UTF-8), reusing the Session-1 gate helpers. Added Section 6 'The sanctioned local-only close path' to ai_router/docs/close-out.md (Troubleshooting renumbered to 7, TOC updated), a Step 8 pointer in docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md, and a check_pushed_to_remote docstring pointer. Bumped dabbler-ai-router 0.26.1 -> 0.26.2 with a CHANGELOG entry; sdist+wheel build clean. Folded in a release-unblocking CI repair: a pre-existing Set 075 standing failure had the default-branch Test workflow red (the stale-tier-framing drift guard matched banned labels as bare substrings, false-positiving on the legitimate telemetry identifiers docs-only-excluded / targetClass=docs-only); the decision to fix it here vs. defer was taken via GPT-5.4 + Gemini Pro consensus, shipped as a separate clearly-labeled commit. Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5-4) converged VERIFIED over three rounds, each driving a real fix (R1: drift-guard over/under-broad + CLI ASCII contract untested + changelog gap; R2: boundary regex exempted dangling separators; R3: clean).
